description.en: ReprEnum uses the repr() of Enum, but the str() of the mixed-in data type: int.__str__() for IntEnum and IntFlag str.__str__() for StrEnum Inherit from ReprEnum to keep the str() / format() of the mixed-in data type instead of using the Enum-default str(). Added in version 3.11.
